prompt: Extreme close up photography of a pair of hands holding the Vissko portable neck fan. description: First frame for Outdoor Walk video
prompt: Candid lifestyle photography of a stylish young French woman standing on a sunny Parisian street in summer. She has the Vissko white portable neck fan resting comfortably around her neck. She is reaching up with one hand to gently adjust the flexible neckband. She is smiling. Shot on 35mm lens, natural bright sunlight, vibrant colors, lifestyle aesthetic, 8k, highly detailed.

He is holding the Vissko white neck fan in his hands, pulling the flexible silicone band open, just about to place it around his neck. Soft diffused window light, professional corporate environment, shallow depth of field, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting.
